results.message: Seg 111: word_repetition — ASR stuttered 'it's like if your house it's like if your house' — repeated clause [REPAIRED replace conf=0.85]
Seg 135: language_confusion — 'Tom Turow does to Egypt' — ASR mangled proper name 'Tom Torero' and misheard 'except' as 'to Egypt' [REPAIRED replace conf=0.87]
Seg 138: nonsense — 'once we're to go up, we'll tell you you're really pretty' — ASR garbled pronouns and verb forms describing Tom Torero's hit-and-run technique [REPAIRED replace conf=0.85]
Seg 151: nonsense — Hallucinated ASR outro 'Thanks for watching!' — not part of actual conversation, likely triggered by end-of-audio silence [REPAIRED delete conf=0.95]
